_meta.note: Party-game / BuzzFeed tone · curly apostrophes only · glossary locked

html_004: Sit side by side, draw a card, and take turns answering.
html_005: Start with light fact-checks, then sink into
html_008: Answers are numbers, dates, one-liners — no dodging!
html_011: Warm-up → tastes → values → feelings → deep honesty. The hotter the card color, the closer you get.
html_013: Whoever draws answers first, then the next card passes to the other.
html_015: Only when you truly can’t answer. —
html_017: Where you stopped shows up at the end of the game.
html_048: Getting to know each other — done!
html_053: The questions you paused on are where a heart lingered. Not today — but someday, ask again.
html_059: 🧺 Picnic for Two — see other games →
js_003: What exact time did you fall asleep last night? (Open your phone and prove it)
js_004: How many photos are in your camera roll right now — exact number?
js_005: How many hours of screen time a day? (Open Settings and show us)
js_007: What’s your drinking limit? (How many drinks)
js_008: Your go-to karaoke song — name the exact title
js_009: Your very first celebrity crush — name?
js_010: How many unread messages do you have right now?
js_011: How many food-delivery orders this month?
js_012: What color are the socks you’re wearing right now?
js_013: What was your very first phone model?
js_014: Your childhood nickname — the funniest one, just one
js_015: How many times have you moved house in your life?
js_016: Your first meal today — what, and at what time?
js_017: When’s the last time you laughed till it hurt — the date?
js_018: What’s your phone lock screen? (Show it right now)
js_019: One food you just can’t eat?
js_020: What’s at the top of your recent search history? (Open it)
js_021: How many alarms do you set, and how many times do you snooze?
js_022: How much cash is in your wallet right now?
js_025: The song you sing in the shower — what’s the title?
js_026: One thing you only do when nobody’s around?
js_027: One app on your phone you’d never let anyone see?
js_028: How many servings have you eaten alone — max? (Name the dish)
js_029: Scrolling in bed — what’s the latest you’ve stayed up till?
js_030: Longest you’ve gone without a shower — how many hours?
js_031: One YouTube channel you secretly subscribe to?
js_032: How many selfies did you take today — and how many did you delete?
js_033: The oldest thing in your fridge — how long has it been there?
js_034: Your biggest impulse buy this month — how much?
js_036: How many times have you decided to start a diet this year?
js_037: How many packages did you order this week?
js_038: Your record for looping one song — which song, how many days?
js_039: What do you usually do on your phone in the bathroom?
js_040: Who’s at the top of your call log right now? (Open it)
js_041: When do you talk to yourself the most? Re-enact your latest one
js_042: Posts you put up then deleted — how many this year?
js_043: How many group chats do you secretly want to leave?
js_044: How many people have you blocked, total?
js_047: Your first-ever flutter — how old, and who? (Initials only)
js_048: How old were you for your first kiss?
js_049: How many relationships have you had so far?
js_050: Your longest relationship — how many years and months?
js_051: Your shortest relationship — how many days till it ended?
js_052: Your blind-date record so far? (Wins out of total)
js_053: Times you confessed vs. times you were confessed to?
js_054: Times you’ve been dumped — honestly, how many?
js_055: Your first love’s initials? Do you know what they’re doing now?
js_056: The last time your heart skipped — when and where?
js_057: The celebrity closest to your type — just one?
js_058: Age gap you’d date — how many years up, how many down?
js_059: People you had a spark with but it fizzled — how many total?
js_060: Exes still saved in your contacts — how many?
js_061: That old flame’s social media — when did you last check it?
js_062: The best gift you ever got from a partner?
js_064: One date you can’t forget? (Numbers only is fine)
js_065: The line that makes your heart race, #1? (One you’ve actually heard)
js_066: Anyone in your contacts you’ve imagined a ‘what if’ about? (Just yes or no)
js_069: One secret even your family doesn’t know — just one (one sentence)
js_070: Your biggest screw-up — how old were you, and what happened?
js_071: Your biggest school-days cringe — just the headline
js_072: People you secretly liked and nobody ever knew — how many total?
js_073: Your bank balance, rounded to the nearest hundred?
js_074: Your biggest-ever purchase — what, and how much?
js_075: Your worst drunk mistake — just the title
js_076: Of the photos you deleted, the one you’d want back — who or what?
js_077: The last time you apologized without really being sorry?
js_078: One thing your parents still don’t know about?
js_079: The most recent time you cried in secret — the date?
js_080: Congrats on the outside, jealous on the inside — your latest moment?
js_081: Do you have a secret social account? (Yes or no — no lying)
js_082: Plans you bailed on by faking sick or busy — how many in the past year?
js_083: One body secret only you know? (A mole, a scar, where it is…)
js_084: Ever quietly ‘borrowed’ something without asking? (How old, and what)
js_085: Your longest one-sided crush — how many years?
js_086: The worst time you got caught in a lie — just the title
js_087: One truth about you everyone assumes they know — but actually don’t?
js_088: So far in this game, how many questions did you want to pass on?
js_091: Your first impression of me — out of 10?
js_092: And now? (One line on why it went up or down)
js_093: The date we first met — do you remember? Say it
js_094: A moment I made your heart skip — if there was one, when?
js_095: Your favorite spot on my face — just one?
js_096: My reply — what’s the longest you’ve waited, in minutes?
js_097: What am I saved as in your phone? (Show me)
js_098: Have you ever told someone about me? What did you say?
js_099: Photos of us together — how many do you have? (Count them)
js_100: One place you’d want to go, just the two of us?
js_101: The exact moment I looked attractive to you — when?
js_102: What caught your eye most about me today?
js_103: Our first message — who reached out first? (Check the logs!)
js_104: Any message from me you screenshotted or reread?
js_105: Right now, our butterflies meter — what percent?
js_106: One habit of mine you secretly find cute?
js_107: Ever sneak a look at me? When was the last time?
js_108: My voice / my laugh — out of 10?
js_109: Can we get one step closer than now? (Yes or no)
js_110: When this game ends, what do you want to do with me?
js_112: You laid bare even the truths about each other. ❤️‍🔥
js_113: You even opened up your secret vaults. 🤫
js_114: You shared your histories of crushes. 💘
jst_002: second answerer — both must answer the same question before the next card
jst_019: It’s okay — a pass is information too.
jst_020: We’ll keep this question in mind.
jst_023: questions — and you both answered every one.
jst_024: Not a single pass. You two were really honest today.

_app.title: Truth Game
_app.desc: Sit side by side, draw cards, take turns telling the truth — a game for two.
